meaning: n.挖剪图画,终止,剪切块,删除部分
examples: There's a life-size cutout of Obama on the wall.
A cardboard cutout of a cheerful Albert Einstein greets visitors.
Your Alpha chanel should fill with white in the shape of your roughly cutout image.
Other teens swarmed the checkout counters with similar purchases, while others kissed the cutout and snapped pictures.
Late last week, the Hannover newspaper received another ransom note, again with cutout letters forming the words.
